description_long: This is a modern, four-door pickup-style sedan with a robust and angular body, finished in a matte dark gray color. The vehicle features a spacious rear cargo bed with a transparent or lightly tinted cover, and the bed appears to have metallic rails and a textured floor. The front end is equipped with a bold grille, prominent headlights, and red tow hooks, giving it a rugged, off-road-ready appearance. Large, black alloy wheels with intricate multi-spoke designs and all-terrain tires are visible, enhancing its aggressive stance. The side profile reveals running boards and tinted windows, while the rear includes a tailgate, rear lights, and a visible bumper. The overall design suggests a blend of utility and urban sophistication, suitable for both city driving and light off-road use.
description: A matte dark gray, four-door pickup-style sedan with a covered cargo bed, bold grille, large black alloy wheels, and rugged detailing.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the covered cargo bed, tailgate, rear lights, and bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, running board, large black wheels, and cargo bed cover.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the bold grille, headlights, red tow hooks, and side mirrors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the wheels, running board, and cargo bed.
attribute_wheel_design: Large black alloy wheels with multi-spoke, angular design and visible lug nuts
